title: UKRI Framework Document 2025
body: "UKRI is the national funding agency investing in science and research in the UK. Operating across the whole of the UK with a combined budget of more than £6 billion, UKRI brings together the 7 Research Councils, Innovate UK and Research England.  The framework document sets out the broad framework within which UKRI will operate, and its relationship with the Department for Science, Innovation and Technology (DSIT).  "
